headline: Why IBM (IBM) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of technology and consulting giant IBM (NYSE:IBM) jumped 12% in the afternoon session after it announced a $10 billion commitment to quantum computing with CHIPS Act backing, supported by a sector read-through from Dell's blowout Q1 results.
